page_content:
Formerly: FILM345.

CINE352 The Baddest Decade: The 1970s in American Film and American History (3 Credits)

The history of the United States and of its cinema in the 1970s. Cross-listed with: HIST304.

Credit Only Granted for. CINE352, FILM352 or HIST304.

Formerly: FILM352.

CINE359 Special Topics in Genres/Auteurs/Cinema Movements (3 Credits)

Examine narrative cinema from the perspective of content (themes, issues, structures) and style through the lens of genre, auteurship

(a concept of authorship in film studies), and/or historical aesthetic movements that have been influential in the development of cinema as an art and film studies as a field. Content varies.
